nodes.label: Bocar Django System
nodes.description: Django REST API project for managing RFQs between Industrialización, Comercialización, and Proveedores.

nodes.label: RFQ (Request for Quotation)
nodes.description: Core business entity representing a quotation request that flows between three areas: Industrialización, Comercialización, and Proveedores.

nodes.label: RFQ Mold
nodes.description: RFQ of type Mold, one of the two RFQ variants managed in the system alongside Trimming.

nodes.label: RFQ Trimming
nodes.description: RFQ of type Trimming, one of the two RFQ variants managed in the system alongside Mold.

nodes.label: RFQ Lifecycle / State Machine
nodes.description: The four-state lifecycle an RFQ passes through: En_Ind → En_Com → En_Pro → Completado.

nodes.label: Status: En_Ind
nodes.description: RFQ status meaning the RFQ is a draft in Industrialización, visible only to its creator.

nodes.label: Status: En_Com
nodes.description: RFQ status meaning the RFQ has been sent to Comercialización for supplier assignment.

nodes.label: Status: En_Pro
nodes.description: RFQ status meaning the RFQ has been assigned to at least one supplier and is awaiting quotation responses.

nodes.label: Status: Completado
nodes.description: Final RFQ status reached when all assigned suppliers have submitted their quotation responses.

nodes.label: Logical Delete
nodes.description: Soft-delete mechanism that marks an RFQ with logical_delete=True instead of physically removing it from the database.

nodes.label: Role: Ind (Industrialización)
nodes.description: User role for the Industrialización area; can create, edit, send RFQs, and request edits.

nodes.label: Role: Ind Admin
nodes.description: Admin variant of the Industrialización role; additionally can perform logical deletes.

nodes.label: Role: Com (Comercialización)
nodes.description: User role for Comercialización; can view all RFQs, assign suppliers, manage edit and extension requests.

nodes.label: Role: Com Admin
nodes.description: Admin variant of the Comercialización role; additionally can perform logical deletes.

nodes.label: Role: Pro (Proveedor)
nodes.description: Supplier user role; can view own assignments, submit quotation responses, and request time extensions.

nodes.label: Role: SinRol
nodes.description: Default role with no area access; user can authenticate but cannot access any functional endpoint.

nodes.label: Área: Industrialización
nodes.description: The area where RFQs originate; responsible for creating, editing, and submitting RFQs to Comercialización.

nodes.label: Área: Comercialización
nodes.description: The area that receives RFQs from Industrialización, assigns suppliers, and manages the quotation process.

nodes.label: Área: Proveedores
nodes.description: The supplier area where providers view their assigned RFQs and submit cost breakdown quotations.

nodes.label: Asignación de Proveedor
nodes.description: Record linking a specific supplier to an RFQ with a due date; marks the start of the quotation phase.

nodes.label: Cost Breakdown
nodes.description: The supplier's detailed quotation form containing prices, timelines, and conditions submitted as a response to an RFQ assignment.

nodes.label: Borrador de Cotización (Draft)
nodes.description: A saved draft of the supplier's cost breakdown; only one draft allowed per assignment; transitions to 'submitted' on final send.

nodes.label: Solicitud de Edición
nodes.description: A formal request created by Industrialización asking Comercialización to revert an RFQ from En_Com back to En_Ind for corrections.

nodes.label: Solicitud de Extensión de Tiempo
nodes.description: A request made by a supplier to extend the due_date of their assignment when they need more time to respond.

nodes.label: JWT Authentication (Cookie HttpOnly)
nodes.description: Authentication mechanism using JWT tokens stored in HttpOnly cookies; access token lasts 15 minutes, refresh token 10 hours.

nodes.label: Módulo: Notificaciones
nodes.description: Django app that sends automatic BCC email notifications on key RFQ lifecycle events via Celery + RabbitMQ.

nodes.label: Celery (Async Task Queue)
nodes.description: Asynchronous task processing framework used to send email notifications without blocking API responses.

nodes.label: RabbitMQ (Message Broker)
nodes.description: Message broker used by Celery as its backend for queuing and processing notification tasks.

nodes.label: Módulo: Historial / Auditoría
nodes.description: Django app that automatically records every lifecycle event of each RFQ including diffs, actor, and timestamps.

nodes.label: Módulo: Chatbot
nodes.description: Natural language query module that lets authenticated users ask questions about RFQs, assignments, and suppliers using an LLM backend.

nodes.label: LLM Backend (BaseLLM)
nodes.description: Abstract adapter interface for LLM providers; supports Gemini and Ollama/local interchangeably via factory pattern.

nodes.label: GeminiLLM (Google Gemini)
nodes.description: LLM backend implementation using Google Gemini API (gemini-2.0-flash by default).

nodes.label: LocalLLM (Ollama)
nodes.description: LLM backend implementation using Ollama running locally; supports any model like Llama, Mistral, etc.

nodes.label: ChatbotQueryView
nodes.description: DRF view handling POST /api_chatbot/v1/query/; applies JWT auth, role permissions, and orchestrates the two-LLM-call flow.

nodes.label: RoleContextBuilder
nodes.description: Builds role-specific allowed_tools dict and system_prompt for the LLM based on the authenticated user's role.

nodes.label: Guardrail 1: Context Injection (Soft)
nodes.description: LLM-level access control that injects role scope into the system_prompt; returns access_denied action if query is out of scope.

nodes.label: Guardrail 2: Code Validation (Hard)
nodes.description: Code-level security check that validates the LLM's requested tool against the role's allowed_tools before any DB query executes.

nodes.label: Swagger / OpenAPI Documentation
nodes.description: Interactive API documentation at /schema/swagger/ used for endpoint testing and visualization.

nodes.label: Django Admin Panel
nodes.description: Django's built-in admin interface for superuser management of the application.

nodes.label: NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED Env Flag
nodes.description: Environment variable that toggles email notification sending; when False, no Celery tasks are enqueued and no broker is needed.

nodes.label: Email Template: rfq_a_compras.html
nodes.description: Email notification template sent to Comercialización when Industrialización submits an RFQ for review.

nodes.label: Email Template: rfq_a_proveedores.html
nodes.description: Email notification template sent to suppliers when they are assigned an RFQ by Comercialización.

nodes.label: Email Template: cotizacion_recibida.html
nodes.description: Email notification template sent to Comercialización when a supplier submits their quotation response.

nodes.label: Email Template: modificacion_rfq.html
nodes.description: Email notification template sent to affected parties when an RFQ is modified/edited and returned to Industrialización.

nodes.label: Email Template: cancelacion_confirmada.html
nodes.description: Email notification template sent to Industrialización and suppliers when an RFQ cancellation is confirmed.

nodes.label: Email Template: solicitud_cancelacion.html
nodes.description: Email notification template sent to admins when a user requests the cancellation of an RFQ; requires admin action.

nodes.label: Security Issues Documentation
nodes.description: Security audit document identifying 12 issues (4 critical/high, 4 medium, 4 low) with status of each fix.

nodes.label: Security: SECRET_KEY Hardcoded (Fixed)
nodes.description: Critical security issue where Django SECRET_KEY was hardcoded in source; fixed by loading from DJANGO_SECRET_KEY env var.

nodes.label: Security: DEBUG/ALLOWED_HOSTS Hardcoded (Fixed)
nodes.description: Critical security issue where DEBUG=True and ALLOWED_HOSTS=["*"] were hardcoded; fixed via environment variables.

nodes.label: Rate Limiting on /auth/login/
nodes.description: DRF ScopedRateThrottle limiting login attempts to 5 per minute per IP to prevent brute-force attacks.

nodes.label: IDOR Protection (Object-level Permissions)
nodes.description: Object-level ownership checks ensuring suppliers can only access their own assignments; audited and confirmed correct.

nodes.label: CookieJWTAuthentication
nodes.description: Custom DRF authentication class that reads JWT from HttpOnly cookies instead of Authorization headers.

nodes.label: API: /api_industrializacion/v1/
nodes.description: REST API prefix for Industrialización area; handles RFQ creation, editing, sending, and edit requests.

nodes.label: API: /api_comercializacion/v1/
nodes.description: REST API prefix for Comercialización area; handles supplier assignment, edit request management, and time extension resolution.

nodes.label: API: /api_proveedores/v1/
nodes.description: REST API prefix for Proveedores area; handles assignment listing, RFQ details, draft creation, and quotation submission.

nodes.label: API: /api_historial/v1/
nodes.description: REST API for reading the audit/history timeline of a specific RFQ with filtering and pagination support.

nodes.label: API: /api_chatbot/v1/
nodes.description: REST API endpoint for natural language queries about the Bocar system data; POST /api_chatbot/v1/query/.

nodes.label: API: /auth/ (Authentication Endpoints)
nodes.description: Authentication endpoints: POST /auth/login/, /auth/logout/, /auth/refresh/, GET /auth/me/.

nodes.label: Due Date / Deadline
nodes.description: Date by which a supplier must submit their quotation response; dynamically displayed as days/hours/expired in API responses.

nodes.label: Archivos Adjuntos (Attachments)
nodes.description: Files attached to an RFQ; at least one attachment is required before an RFQ can be sent from En_Ind to En_Com.

nodes.label: is_admin Flag
nodes.description: Boolean user attribute distinguishing admin users within each role; required for logical deletes and other privileged operations.

nodes.label: Django REST Framework (DRF)
nodes.description: Django REST Framework used to build all API endpoints, with custom permission classes, authentication, and throttling.

nodes.label: Environment Variables (.env)
nodes.description: Configuration loaded via python-dotenv from a .env file; controls secrets, email settings, Celery broker, LLM backend, and debug mode.

nodes.label: Notification: notificar_comercializacion
nodes.description: Celery task triggered when Industrialización sends an RFQ to Comercialización; sends rfq_a_compras email.

nodes.label: Notification: notificar_proveedores
nodes.description: Celery task triggered when Comercialización creates supplier assignments; sends rfq_a_proveedores email.

nodes.label: Notification: notificar_cotizacion_recibida
nodes.description: Celery task triggered when a supplier submits their quotation answer; sends cotizacion_recibida email to Comercialización.

nodes.label: Notification: notificar_cancelacion_solicitada (Pending)
nodes.description: Pending Celery task for cancellation request flow; function exists in services/tasks but trigger endpoint not yet built.

nodes.label: Chatbot Tools: TOOLS_IND (Ind Role)
nodes.description: Set of chatbot tools available to Ind role: contar_rfqs, listar_rfqs, historial_rfq — scoped to own RFQs.

nodes.label: Chatbot Tools: TOOLS_COM (Com Role)
nodes.description: Superset chatbot tools for Com role including all Ind tools plus contar_rfqs_todos, listar_rfqs_todos, rfqs_por_status, listar_proveedores, listar_asignaciones.

nodes.label: Chatbot Tools: TOOLS_PRO (Pro Role)
nodes.description: Chatbot tools for Pro role: only mis_asignaciones — scoped to own assignments.

nodes.label: CORS Configuration
nodes.description: Cross-origin resource sharing configuration via django-cors-headers; security issue #10, marked as corrected.

nodes.label: Security: DEFAULT_PERMISSION_CLASSES Missing (Pending)
nodes.description: Pending security fix: DRF defaults to AllowAny when DEFAULT_PERMISSION_CLASSES is not set, exposing views that forget to declare permission_classes.

nodes.label: Security: JWT Role Staleness (Pending)
nodes.description: Pending security issue: role and is_admin claims frozen in JWT at login time; role changes take up to 10 hours to apply.

nodes.label: Security: SameSite=Lax vs Strict (Pending)
nodes.description: Pending security improvement: cookies use SameSite=Lax; Strict would be safer for this enterprise internal app.

nodes.label: Security: RabbitMQ Default Credentials (Pending)
nodes.description: Pending security risk: CELERY_BROKER_URL defaults to amqp://guest:guest@localhost, exposing default RabbitMQ credentials if not overridden in production.

links.label: requires at least one before submission
can revert to via approved edit request
only valid when RFQ is in
transitions to on first supplier assignment
transitions to when all suppliers respond
saved as draft before final submission
